title: Wetland
description: A new biome named Wetland with moss and swamp feature
body:
# Wetland Biome
- The Wetland biome replace half of the swamp in the overworld
- It has more river and lower terrain than other biomes
- It has the same spawn as the swamp but without the extra Slime spawning
- Moss cover ~60% of the surface too !

This mod is 100% server side !


icon by @tort_in_end
